Vocational School

Programs

Graphic Design

MENU

To train self-confident designers who are technically and aesthetically trained in graphic design-related fields, who can analyze their environment and age, who have investigative and creative potential to solve design problems, and who are equipped with the skills to adapt to the dynamic structure of the communication age. With a curriculum prepared for this purpose, our students are equipped with the skills to meet the basic requirements of their profession and improve their interdisciplinary working skills by getting to know different application areas.

With industry-university collaboration and support, we capture the momentum of design and our curricula remain up-to-date according to the needs of the age.

Our graduate students can work in promotion and advertising agencies, advertising and promotion units of companies, print media organizations, printing, photography, filmmaking industries, television channels, web-based publishing organizations, and they can continue their careers in their own businesses or as freelance designers.
